"user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49853", "cvss": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "## Summary

When SimpleAsyncHTTPClient follows a 3xx redirect, it shallow-copies the original HTTPRequest, rewrites the URL, decrements max_redirects, and removes only the Host header. It does not clear Authorization, auth_username, auth_password, or auth_mode when the redirect target changes origin.

As a result, credentials intended for one origin can be forwarded to a different origin when follow_redirects=True, which is the default.

Beginning in Tornado 6.5.6, `SimpleAsyncHTTPClient` matches the default behavior of `libcurl` (and therefore `CurlAsyncHTTPClient`): When a redirect changes the scheme, host, or port of the url, the `Authorization` and `Cookie` headers will be removed when following the redirect. ", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf", "html_url": "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/security/advisories/GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49853"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-27T15:46:00Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/160562?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bdarnell", "id": 160562, "login": "bdarnell", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE2MDU2Mg==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Authorization header forwarded across cross-origin redirects in SimpleAsyncHTTPClient", "updated_at": "2026-06-02T18:55:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tornadoweb/tornado/security-advisories/GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "tornado"}, "patched_versions": "6.5.6", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<6.5.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Authorization header forwarded across cross-origin redirects in SimpleAsyncHTTPClient
